data.location: Near Eastern Way, Melksham, Wiltshire, UK (1.9 hectares of farmland, 1.8km from town centre; full address not specified)
data.event_date: Not specified (subject to planning approval by Wiltshire Council)
data.status: proposed; plans unveiled; subject to planning approval
data.short_description: Lidl has unveiled plans to relocate its existing Bath Road store in Melksham to a larger site near Eastern Way, proposing a new 2,184 sq m store with a 1,529 sq m sales floor, 132 parking spaces, and 384 roof-mounted solar panels. The existing Bath Road store would close as part of the move, which would create 10 additional jobs. The project requires approval from Wiltshire Council planners.

data.short_description: Lidl's existing 20-year-old Bath Road store in Melksham is proposed to close as part of plans to relocate to a new, larger site near Eastern Way. The closure is contingent on planning approval from Wiltshire Council.

data.location: Kerala, India (statewide; specific addresses not specified)
data.short_description: KHRA announced a statewide shutdown of hotels and restaurants on May 6 to protest a sharp increase in commercial LPG prices, with cylinders now costing beyond ₹3,000 in the state. Industry representatives warned that menu prices may need to rise by 50–60% to sustain operations.

data.location: Sugar Land Town Square, Sugar Land, TX (full address not specified)
data.short_description: Rainbow Cloudz has opened a second location in Sugar Land Town Square, selling plushies, Pokémon, Labubus, accessories, and other collectible items. The store also operates as a slime bar in partnership with Kawaii Slime Company and as a children's party venue.

data.location: Lower Hill District, Pittsburgh, PA (full address not specified) — adjacent to PPG Paints Arena
data.short_description: Citizens Live at the Wylie is a new 4,000-capacity live music venue in Pittsburgh's Lower Hill District set to debut in fall 2026, with Pittsburgh native Wiz Khalifa headlining the kickoff on October 2. The venue features a general admission floor, balcony seating, a rooftop lounge, and premium hospitality areas.

data.location: 400 Mosaic Court, St. Joseph, MO (zip not specified)
data.event_date: Soft opening: April 20; Ribbon cutting: May 7; Grand Opening: May 9
data.short_description: The Rolling Hills Consolidated Library's new Riverside branch soft-opened April 20 after more than two years of planning and 18 months of construction. A ribbon-cutting is scheduled for May 7 and a grand opening on May 9 featuring an all-day open house with tours and giveaways. The 36,000-square-foot facility houses the library's largest branch, the Bookmobile office, Administration Office, and a used bookstore.

data.location: Île de Bendor, Bandol, Provence, France
data.short_description: Zannier Île de Bendor, a 93-key hotel on a private island off Bandol, has opened following a five-year transformation. The project is a collaboration between Société Paul Ricard and Zannier Hotels, reviving the island originally developed by Paul Ricard in 1950. The reopened property includes eight dining spaces, a wellbeing centre, diving centre, and kids' club across three distinct guest settings.

data.location: Birmingham, Bolton, Lancaster, Swindon, UK (multiple locations)
data.event_date: By end of June 2026 (90 shops); by April 2027 (further 100)
data.short_description: Cancer Research UK is closing 90 charity shops by end of June 2026, with a further 100 closures by April 2027. The organisation cited rising costs and changing shopping habits as reasons, aiming to reduce its shop count to 320 high-performing locations.

Sleep Basil Mattress Co. has launched a new location page targeting Cherry Hills Village shoppers, directing them to its Denver showroom. The locally owned, owner-operated store is run by founders Phil and Josh, who offer personalized mattress consultations and complimentary delivery.

data.location: Star Metals District, West Midtown, Atlanta, GA (east of Howell Mill Road, Marietta Street Artery neighborhood)
data.status: plans to open prior to June 14
data.short_description: LadyBird Westside is an adaptive-reuse restaurant and bar opening in a transformed warehouse in Atlanta's Star Metals District. It is the second location of the Old Fourth Ward establishment and is timed to capture FIFA World Cup foot traffic. The development includes a beer garden, full kitchen and bar, and large greenspaces.

data.location: Star Metals District, West Midtown, Atlanta, GA
data.status: on pace to open by June 14
data.short_description: Incognito is a high-end cocktail bar opening next door to LadyBird Westside in Atlanta's Star Metals District. It is also targeting a pre-June 14 opening to coincide with FIFA World Cup crowds. No further details about the bar's concept were provided.

data.location: Aventura, FL (initial test; broader US rollout noted)
data.short_description: Aldi is testing a redesigned store format developed by Australian design firm Landini Associates, featuring new signage, updated pricing language, and refreshed visuals. The new format is intended as a singular global trading format adaptable across all 11 countries where Aldi South operates. The U.S. test began at an Aventura, Florida location in September 2025.

Marks & Spencer is opening five new food stores across the UK as part of a £90 million investment programme. Locations include stores in Hatfield, Luton, Farnham (Surrey), Abingdon (Oxfordshire), and Godalming (Surrey), with a further Surrey opening anticipated for summer 2026.
